item.title: How to Talk to Your Coworkers
item.description: You know you explained the same issue before in two or three different places, yet here they are asking again. Why don't they understand you? Why do they ask the same question when you've already give

item.title: OpenSCAD LLM Benchmark: Building the Pantheon | ModelRift Blog
item.description: A practical OpenSCAD LLM benchmark comparing Codex 5.5 High, Claude Sonnet, Claude Opus, Cursor Composer, Google Antigravity, and ModelRift on a detailed Pantheon model.

item.title: How to Call an API from an Email
item.description: Emails can’t run JavaScript, but by selling your soul to the CSS devil you can get pretty close.

item.title: This blog ran on Ubuntu 16.04 for 10 years. I migrated it to FreeBSD
item.description: After a decade on Ubuntu 16.04, I migrated my blog to FreeBSD on Hetzner. Some notes on setting up a VPS with FreeBSD, Jails, Bastille, Caddy reverse proxies, and load testing and benchmarking the blog from four continents.

item.title: Technical Interviews Reject the Wrong Engineers
item.description: 20 years of observation, 50 years of research, and a framework for measuring the interview instead of the candidate
item.author: (https://fagnerbrack.com)

item.title: We replaced Redis with MySQL for inventory reservations—and it scaled (2026) - Shopify
item.description: How we used SKIP LOCKED, composite primary keys, and connection visibility to hit our scale targets.

item.title: BBEdit 16 is here! | Bare Bones Software
item.description: There are more than a hundred new feature additions, changes, and refinements, including forward-looking foundational work which brings order-of-magnitude performance improvements in some parts of the product.
